hero.title: Topic highlights from the original content
hero.intro: A consolidated list of source blog themes, rewritten as quick-read updates.

posts.title: Dive In: How Hydrotherapy Can Transform Your Dog's Life
posts.excerpt: Hydrotherapy content highlights low-impact exercise, mobility support, and tailored water-based sessions for dogs with different needs.

posts.title: From Wolf to Woof: The Amazing Journey of Dogs
posts.excerpt: This topic explores how selective breeding shaped modern canine roles, traits, and temperament across working and companion breeds.

posts.title: Happy Hounds: Why Doggy Daycare Beats Staying Home Alone
posts.excerpt: Daycare-focused content emphasizes supervised social play, stimulation, and routine for dogs who need active daytime engagement.

posts.title: Get Your Groom On
posts.excerpt: Grooming articles focus on coat care, styling options, and practical maintenance services that support canine comfort and hygiene.

posts.title: Holiday Hounds: Your Dog-Friendly Getaway Guide
posts.excerpt: Travel topic pages provide planning context for owners managing routines, transport, and care continuity while away from home.

posts.title: How to Keep Your Dog Entertained Indoors
posts.excerpt: Indoor activity guidance covers enrichment ideas and structured games to reduce boredom and maintain healthy mental stimulation.
